title: Elevated
body: Gain an all-new perspective as you take aerial tours of the world's most remarkable landscapes, led by well-known guides with a special connection to each place. Apple's flagship AIV travel series, 4 episodes. UploadVR review — NYC episode: can Apple Immersive Video convey the spirit of New York?

title: Elevated — E1: Hawaii
body: Aulii Cravalho 2024-09

title: Elevated — E2: Maine
body: Tim Robbins 2025-10

title: Elevated — E3: Switzerland
body: Carla Juri 2026-02

title: Adventure
body: Join pioneering athletes as they take on awe-inspiring challenges in some of the world's most spectacular locations. Adventure sports series, 5 episodes, 2024–2025.

title: Boundless
body: Embark on the kind of bucket-list trips you've only dreamed of as you explore extraordinary places and meet inspiring people. Adventure series, 2024–2025.

title: Wild Life
body: Get up close and personal with some of the most charismatic creatures on the planet — and uncover what makes them unique with the experts who know them best. Adventure/nature series, 4 episodes, 2024–2025.

title: Flight Ready
body: Report to the flight deck of the USS Nimitz and strap in with F-18 fighter pilots for a full-throttle ride through the skies. F-18 fighter pilots aboard the USS Nimitz.

title: Prehistoric Planet Immersive
body: Transport yourself into the daily lives of dinosaurs, and follow the struggles and triumphs of these majestic animals amid spectacular scenery. Documentary series, 2 episodes, 2024.

title: Prehistoric Planet Immersive — E1: Pterosaur Beach
Prehistoric Planet Immersive — E2: Triceratops Forest
Top Dogs
body: They're chasing greatness — and they'll stop at nothing to win. Get up close with these cute, fiercely competitive canine stars (and their humans) as they face off at Crufts, the world's biggest dog show. AIV documentary series, 2 episodes. Crufts dog show.

title: Top Dogs — E1: The Giant Killer
Top Dogs — E2: Best in Show
World of Red Bull
body: Get ready for a rush like no other. Tackle the biggest waves, tallest mountains, and fastest speeds with Red Bull's fearless athletes. Sports series.

title: World of Red Bull — E1: Backcountry Skiing
Real Madrid: The Weight of Greatness
body: Experience an unprecedented, all-access look inside a Real Madrid Champions League match day, revealing up close what it takes to live up to the legacy of the world's most successful football club. Free on Apple TV. Shot over 5 days during the 2025 Champions League with 30+ URSA Cine Immersive camer

title: MotoGP: Tour De Force
body: An electric atmosphere. A dramatic scenario. An historical moment in MotoGP™, the pinnacle of motorcycle racing. May 2025. On the starting grid of the French MotoGP™ Grand Prix, Johann Zarco doesn't seem ready to end France's 71-year wait for a home victory in the first class of motorcycle racing. A

title: F1 The Movie: Hot Lap Immersive
body: Strap in alongside Brad Pitt's character Sonny Hayes for a high-speed test drive around the Yas Marina Circuit in Abu Dhabi — directed by Joe Kosinski (Top Gun: Maverick) and captured in 180-degree 8K Apple Immersive Video. Now available again as bonus content for the F1 feature film. Was previously

title: VIP
body: Experience the cathedrals of sport — with a behind-the-scenes look at how elite athletes, dedicated staff, diehard fans, and unforgettable moments make the world's most iconic venues come alive. Behind-the-scenes at iconic sports venues.

title: Man vs. Beast
body: Hang on tight as professional bull riders take you inside the rodeo and show you what it takes to compete in the dangerous sport. Professional bull riding — inside the rodeo.

title: 2023 MLS Cup Highlights
body: Join MLS superstars on the pitch as Columbus make their heart-pounding push for the club's third MLS crown. Columbus Crew's push for their third MLS crown.

title: 2024 NBA All-Star Weekend
body: Take the court as gravity-defying icons and emerging stars ignite the NBA's star-packed weekend. Gravity-defying icons at NBA's star-packed weekend.

title: Spectrum Front Row — Lakers in Apple Immersive
body: Get a front-row seat to Los Angeles Lakers basketball in Apple Immersive — a revolutionary storytelling format available only on Apple Vision Pro. Six games from January through March 2026, captured in stunning 180-degree 8K with Spatial Audio. Six Lakers games via Spectrum Front Row, Jan–Mar 2026.

title: Spectrum Front Row — Lakers in Apple Immersive — Bucks at Lakers
Spectrum Front Row — Lakers in Apple Immersive — 76ers at Lakers
Spectrum Front Row — Lakers in Apple Immersive — Clippers at Lakers
Spectrum Front Row — Lakers in Apple Immersive — Lakers at Nuggets

Spectrum Front Row — Lakers in Apple Immersive — Wizards at Lakers
Metallica
body: Get unprecedented access to the hard rock band in this first-of-its-kind concert experience. First-of-its-kind immersive concert. Shot in Mexico City with 14 immersive cameras and a custom stage setup.

title: BBC Proms — Debut at the BBC Proms
body: Pianist Lukas Sternath makes his BBC Proms debut performing Edvard Grieg's Piano Concerto in A minor with the BBC Symphony Orchestra and their Chief Conductor, Sakari Oramo. The first classical music concert available in Apple Immersive — viewers enjoy the performance inches from the pianist's hands

title: Alicia Keys: Rehearsal Room
body: Get a rare glimpse into the GRAMMY® winner's creative process with this intimate rehearsal session featuring renditions of her hits "No One," "If I Ain't Got You," and "You Don't Know My Name." Intimate rehearsal featuring 'No One,' 'If I Ain't Got You,' and 'You Don't Know My Name'.

title: NEAREST CORTIS
body: What goes on in CORTIS's rehearsal room? Let's get up close and personal with CORTIS offstage. CORTIS backstage rehearsal room. BIGHIT/HYBE boy band, track 'GO!'.

title: Concert For One
body: Enjoy exclusive, up-close access to private performances from today's most electrifying artists. Exclusive private performances.

title: The Weeknd: Open Hearts
body: Journey alongside The Weeknd as he weaves his way through a surreal, haunting cityscape in this electrifying sonic voyage. Music video. The Weeknd navigates a surreal, haunting cityscape.

title: Bono: Stories of Surrender
body: Through words, music, and mischief, Bono pulls back the curtain on his deeply personal experiences that have shaped him as a son, father, husband, activist, and U2 frontman. First feature-length AIV film. Directed by Elad Offer.

title: Submerged
body: A WWII submarine crew combats a harrowing torpedo attack in this adrenaline-pumping thrill ride. From filmmaker Edward Berger, director of the Academy Award®-winning All Quiet on the Western Front. WWII submarine crew under torpedo attack. Directed by Edward Berger (All Quiet on the Western Front).

title: Experience Immersive
body: Go backstage, onstage, and beyond with Metallica. Feel the game-day adrenaline inside Yankee Stadium. Plunge into a gripping submarine thriller. Experience the awe-inspiring like never before with this special preview of Apple Immersive Video. Preview/sampler. Clips from Metallica, Yankees, and Subm

title: Julaymba
body: Step into the heart of the world's oldest rainforest. In the lush Daintree Rainforest of North Tropical Queensland, Australia, journey with the Eastern Kuku Yalanji people — the Indigenous Traditional Custodians — where an Elder welcomes you through stories, ceremony, and a profound connection to co

title: Experience Paris
body: An immersive film from The Explorers celebrating French heritage. Discover the quiet precision of a three-Michelin-star kitchen, ascend to breathtaking heights atop the city's most iconic tower, and experience the timeless charm of Montmartre's historic streets. By The Explorers. Still unreleased as

title: Journey to Antarctica to Find Emperor Penguins with CNN's Bill Weir
body: CNN's chief climate correspondent Bill Weir joins a scientific expedition to Antarctica, bringing audiences into unbelievable proximity with emperor penguins emerging from winter with newborn chicks on Snow Hill Island. Spring 2026 — may still be unreleased.

title: Audi F1 Project
body: Mentioned in the Apple Newsroom in September 2025 — no further details yet.

title: 4 Minutes Inside Super Bowl LVIII
body: Experience four thrilling minutes on the field during Super Bowl LVIII between the Kansas City Chiefs and the San Francisco 49ers — captured in Apple Immersive Video. Chiefs vs. 49ers. Was available Sep 2024.

title: The Fine Dining Bakery
body: Clara Chong dir, Ben Allan prod. About Christopher Thé and the world's most Instagrammed cake. Documentary / Food

title: The Dobos Connection
body: Clara Chong dir, Ben Allan & Mike Seymour PhD prod. Romantic drama set over one evening at a university. Drama / Narrative

title: Jenna Paints Vidiots
body: Sign painter Jenna Homen at the IRL Eagle Theater and Vidiots video store. Documentary / Culture

title: Robot.com
body: First-ever brand commercial in Apple Immersive Video. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive. Ad / Tech

title: Urban Theory
body: They came, they Tutted, you loved it. A Sandwich Vision collaboration with the Italian dance crew Urban Theory. Updated from teaser to full film June 2026. Art / Culture

title: Seeing Things: Sensorama
body: Part one of a three-part VR history series. In association with the Immersive Archive at USC. Documentary / History

title: Seeing Things: Scott Fisher
body: How an artist engineered one of the pivotal machines of virtual reality, from the MIT Architecture Machine Group, to Atari and NASA. Part two of a three-part series. Sandwich Vision in association with the Immersive Archive at USC. Documentary / History

title: Yo-yo Technique
body: First-of-its-kind documentary on the Spirit Yo team and the art of yo-yo. Documentary / Art

title: WAI-000
body: VJ WOOO & Emmy-winning Gryun Kim. Spatial sound by Echoic Audio. 'If AI is fed from human memories, what happens when it grows nostalgic?' Narrative / Sci-fi

title: Nebula Junkyard
body: SUPER POP Festival collaboration between VJ WOOO and K-Pop producer TOYO. Music / AV

title: We Make Belonging
body: Color artist Morag Myerscough transforms Munich's Flux Museum. Dir: Carl Amadeus Hiller & Isabelle Vlahos. Documentary / Art

title: Resonance
body: Master luthier Niklaus Weber crafts a violin. Dir: Carl Amadeus Hiller & Sheila Uschkurat. Documentary / Music

title: KICK
body: Three French freeriders build and ride the ultimate jump deep in the French Alps, culminating in a double backflip. Shot over two days on URSA Cine Immersive. ~10% of shots are in-motion. Dir: Antoine Baille. In-depth production craft article in IBC (June 2026) covers camera placement, movement, pac

title: Echoes of the Middle East
body: Desert, mountain, and undersea environments across the UAE and Oman. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive. By Altitude101 (Amaury Pierlot). Documentary / Travel

title: The Longest Day
body: altitude.101 follows triathlete Jules Wagner through the brutal arc of training and competition, from the first stroke to the finish line. Subtitles: English on Amplium; English, German, Japanese on Theater. Altitude101. Free in both Theater and Amplium. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive with custom under

title: Kids Elite Live
body: Kids Elite dancers in Paris. From upcoming doc 'Sabrina Lonis, From Kids to Elite Dancers.' By Immersive Flashback. Link opens Theater app main videos page — update to direct deep link when marquee publishes it. Documentary / Culture

title: Spatial Film
body: Streaming library of 180° and 360° spatial films for Apple Vision Pro. Created by Keeley Turner, Hugh Hou, and SliceOfLifeVR. Open the app on Vision Pro to watch. Browse creator content on YouTube.

title: Amplium
body: Curated immersive video platform for Apple Vision Pro. Carries altitude.101 titles including KICK, Echoes of the Middle East, and The Longest Day.

title: Prima Immersive
body: Native 16K/90fps/HDR distribution. Content: The Spatialists: Sessions. New content in production.

title: FrontRow
body: Spatial video concerts, comedy specials, and white label brand experiences.

title: Blue Frog Immersive
body: Immersive 3D concert performances with spatial audio.

title: AmazeVR
body: VR concerts bringing fans face-to-face with artists.

title: YouTube for visionOS
body: Supports 3D 360°, VR180, standard video. 8K on M5 Vision Pro.

title: Explore POV
body: 2025 Apple Vision Pro App of the Year. Immersive content library.

title: Voola — Immersive Photo/Video
body: Immersive photo and video viewer for Apple Vision Pro. Includes AIV content from Chinese productions — confirmed to carry 'Land Your Dream in Space: Zhuque-3 Launch Vehicle Flight Test Mission' (first AIV rocket launch film, June 2026).

title: JustVR
body: Cross-platform immersive video app (Vision Pro, Meta Quest, Pico). Creator-built library.

title: Let's Go Fly! by Cirrus Aircraft
body: 7-min AIV flight experience over the American Southwest in a Cirrus SR22T, plus full-scale interactive 3D models of SR Series and Vision Jet built from engineering CAD files. Shot at 16K (8K per eye) on the Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive — aerial footage captured by the Top Gun: Maverick filming cre

title: What If…? An Immersive Story
body: Disney+ Original interactive experience. Marvel Studios' What If…? universe. Not AIV — interactive immersive experience.

title: Blueplanet VR
body: 100+ photogrammetric spatial experiences of UNESCO World Heritage Sites. By Eric Hanson, USC faculty.

title: Pulse of Time
body: Immersive 3D experiences built for Apple Vision Pro — not video on a screen. You are placed at the center of defining moments as they unfold around you. Includes Dinosaur Apocalypse. Vision Pro exclusive.

title: Balenciaga — Summer 26 Show
body: Pier Paolo Piccioli's debut Balenciaga collection. Available in Balenciaga's own Vision Pro app. Shot on URSA Cine Immersive.

title: LALÒ Immersive
body: Filipino-American choral music for Apple Vision Pro. The LALÒ Ensemble performs in Apple Immersive Video captured on the Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive with Apple Spatial Audio Format (higher-order ambisonics). Also includes photogrammetry-based venue recreations, spatial music sheets, and behind-th

title: Immersive America — Waterfalls
body: California & Kauai waterfalls. 8K on YouTube VR. 8K on M5 Vision Pro, 4K on M2.

title: Immersive America — American Southwest
body: Grand Canyon, Bryce Canyon, Monument Valley, Zion, Las Vegas. WebXR + APMP format.

title: Blueplanet VR Explore
body: 100+ photogrammetric spatial experiences via WebXR.

title: Yosemite in Snow
body: Community creator. Canon R5C + Qoocam3 VR180. Stream on DeoVR. Full resolution versions available to download at buymeacoffee.com/realityofvision/yosemite-in-snow2026

title: Bastille Day France — Immersive Flashback
body: President Macron as narrator. 8 min. May be geo-locked to France. Available at Maison Élysée on Vision Pro.

title: Twin Peaks in 180VR
body: VR180, May 2026. By Brendan Parker. Real Twin Peaks locations in Washington State.

title: Cartagena, Colombia in 8K VR180
body: By u/BeyondVRMedia, May 2026. Walled City, San Felipe Fortress, colonial streets, flamingos.

title: Mulan 2125
body: VR epic by Well-Ink. Film-grade CG, monocular 4K 3D immersion. Mulan's awakening in a post-apocalyptic world. Venice Immersive Competition 2025 official selection.

title: 3D Expedition GeForce — 25 YRS Unbeaten VR Roller Coaster
body: Ride Expedition GeForce at Holiday Park, Germany — 25th anniversary of the world's best coaster. 8K Spatial 3D VR180, May 2026.

title: SliceOfLifeVR
body: Independent immersive video platform. Titles available via web and DeoVR. Creator-focused library of VR180 and spatial content including Hugh Hou productions.

title: DeoVR — Hyper VR Videos
body: VR video player for Apple Vision Pro. Carries immersive content including Chinese AIV productions — confirmed to carry the Zhuque-3 rocket launch film.

title: OpenImmersive
body: Free, open-source immersive and spatial video player for Apple Vision Pro. Supports AIV, spatial, 180, 360, mono, stereo, side-by-side, and over-under formats. Built on RealityKit by Acute Immersive.

title: Acute Pro
body: Companion app to the Acute Immersive Platform — a publishing CMS for spatial and immersive video. Features in-team and external sharing, timecoded comments exportable to DaVinci Resolve, and publishing to visionOS apps with IAP, push notifications, and analytics. By Acute Immersive.

title: Acute Immersive
body: AIV content platform.

title: ARLUMA360
body: VR180 immersive content player. First release: Finland Icescapes Pt. 1 (May 2026).

title: Immersa — Spatial Cinema
body: Professional delivery platform for immersive filmmakers and studios.

title: Apple Immersive Video Utility (AIVU)
body: Import media, create .aivu files, prepare AIV content for playback or distribution.

title: Colorfront Immersive Utility
body: Professional Mac app (Apple Silicon M1+, macOS 26+). GPU-accelerated .aivu creation from ProRes or MV-HEVC. Free tier available; MV-HEVC License $299/year.

title: AIME Generator
body: Creates AIV lens profile files (.aime) for virtually any VR180 camera. Mac only. Democratizes AIV creation beyond the URSA.

title: MainConcept MV-HEVC Encoder SDK
body: Codec SDK 16.2. DaVinci Resolve Studio + Colorfront integration. April 14, 2026.

title: Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive 100G
body: World's first live production AIV camera. Dual 8K×8K RGBW sensors, 100G Ethernet, 16 stops DR. NAB 2026.

title: Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive Camera Manual
body: Full guide covering camera operation and DaVinci Resolve AIV workflows. PDF.

title: Wooden Camera — URSA Cine Immersive Accessories
body: Redesigned Top Plate, Side Rails, Riser Plate, D-Box Gold Mount Plus power system.

title: Gates Immersive Housing
body: Underwater housing for URSA Cine Immersive. Developed with Apple and Blackmagic Design. 12-inch AR-coated glass dome port. Depth-rated. Available for sale and hire.

title: Logitech MUSE Stylus for Vision Pro
body: Precision stylus for Vision Pro.

title: PlayStation VR2 Sense Controller & Charging Station
body: Traditional gaming controller support for Vision Pro. Available on Apple Store.

title: Meet Apple Spatial Audio Format and APAC
body: Official Apple session introducing ASAF and the Apple Positional Audio Codec (APAC).

title: fxguide — Believable and Immersive Audio
body: By Mike Seymour. FMX spatial audio recording + ASAF deep dive for AIV. Includes downloadable ASAF example file.

title: Cinematic Immersive for Professionals
body: By Ben Allan & Clara Chong. First comprehensive guide to AIV creative and technical workflow. Apple Books.

title: Creator Week Educational Series
body: Overview of all media types for visionOS apps, games, and experiences.

title: Team2Films Immersive Master Class
body: What it takes to create an AIV documentary.

title: Hugh Hou AIV Master Class
body: Complete URSA Cine Immersive to Apple Vision Pro workflow in DaVinci Resolve.

title: AIV Community YouTube Playlist
body: Community-curated collection of AIV production videos.

body: AIV format, ImmersiveMediaSupport framework, encoding, and HLS streaming.

title: Explore Video Experiences for visionOS (WWDC25)
body: Profiles for 180°, 360°, Wide FOV, AIV, 2D, 3D, and spatial video.

title: What is Apple Immersive Video? — Acute Immersive
body: Clear, accessible explainer on the format, hardware, and what makes it different.

title: ImmersiveMediaSupport Framework
body: Apple developer documentation for immersive media technologies.

title: GB Railfreight + JigSpace — Spatial Training
body: One of the UK's first freight operators to use spatial computing for immersive remote training.

title: University of Michigan — VR for MS Depression
body: Professor earns national recognition for using VR to bring nature experiences to MS patients with limited mobility.

title: Brain Games Studio — Rodney ALS + BCI + XR
body: Thought-controlled BCI technology combined with XR for a person with ALS.

title: The Mandalorian Director Uses Vision Pro to Preview IMAX
body: Jon Favreau used a custom Vision Pro app to preview the full IMAX scope during filming.

title: NASA Artemis II — Filmed in Immersive Video
body: Artemis II launch captured in Apple Immersive Video. Content not yet released as of May 2026.

title: Met Museum — HD 3D Scans of Art Objects
body: Metropolitan Museum of Art releases high-detail 3D models of art objects.

title: Immersive for Autodesk VRED
body: Stream Autodesk VRED from on-premises RTX workstations to Vision Pro. Four-way collaboration: Autodesk, Apple, NVIDIA, Innoactive. Up to 2 participants.

title: See The Bravo
body: Aviation airspace 3D visualization for pilot training. Students see shelves, altitudes, and procedures in 3D space instead of flat charts.

title: Full Sail University — Spatial Computing Innovation Lab
body: First higher education institution in the US with URSA Cine Immersive. 50 Apple Vision Pro devices. Winter Park, FL.

title: Purdue PVM Pro Tips for Animal Health
body: Vision Pro exclusive from Purdue College of Veterinary Medicine. Step-by-step at-home pet care tutorials created by Purdue vets.

title: Intune Userless ADE for visionOS
body: Vision Pro can be enrolled and managed through Apple Business Manager via Microsoft Intune.

title: iRacing Connect
body: World's most popular online racing simulator on Vision Pro. visionOS 26.4 foveated streaming + Nvidia CloudXR.

title: SpatialGen Zeus — Live AIV Streaming Hardware
body: On-premise 3U server unit for live Apple Immersive Video streaming — 4320×4320 per eye at 90 FPS, believed to be the first time full-spec live MV-HEVC has been achieved on Vision Pro. ProRes 2110 in → MV-HEVC stream out, handles all dynamic metadata and segmenting. Configurable to customer CDN. Life

title: Steam Link
body: Native Vision Pro app. Stream your full Steam library wirelessly from a PC.

title: Apple Immersive & Spatial Computing — Curated Reddit Feed
body: Curated multireddit covering r/AppleImmersiveVideo, r/VisionPro, r/VR180Film, and more.

title: Caradise
body: Explore iconic car designs in spatial computing. Vision Pro exclusive. Solo developer: Peder Sandqvist. Apple Design Awards 2026 finalist.

title: Gracia: 4DGS Viewer
body: Stream and view 4D Gaussian Splat (4DGS) volumetric content on Apple Vision Pro. By Rogue Labs. Launched June 16, 2026. YouTube walkthrough by Himels Tech: https://youtu.be/j3aaXpFe8so

title: Aegis Core
body: Immersive AR arcade shooter for Apple Vision Pro. Your space becomes a battlefield against a robotic uprising — custom hand gestures, room scanning, positional awareness. Written entirely in RealityKit, ARKit, and Swift by developer Michael Bundy.

title: Apple Immersive Video Utility (AIVU)
body: Apple's own tool for importing media, creating .aivu files, and preparing Apple Immersive Video content for playback or distribution. Free on the Mac App Store.

title: Colorfront Immersive Utility
body: Professional Mac app (Apple Silicon M1+, macOS 26 Tahoe+) for creating .aivu files from ProRes or MV-HEVC source. GPU-accelerated encoding, foveation, APAC spatial audio conversion, and multi-shot assembly via FCP XML. Free tier available. MV-HEVC License: $299/year. "From camera original to Apple V

title: MainConcept MV-HEVC Encoder SDK
body: Codec SDK 16.2 with DaVinci Resolve Studio and Colorfront integration for MV-HEVC encoding. April 2026.

title: APMP Metadata
body: Mac app for injecting, previewing, and exporting Apple Projected Media Profile (APMP) metadata — no command line required. Supports the full APMP specification including spatial, parametric, stereoscopic, and 360° workflows. Includes integrated VEXU (Video Extension Universal) metadata editing, vide

title: Gracia — 4D Gaussian Splat Encoding & Distribution
body: Processing and distribution pipeline for 4D Gaussian Splat (4DGS) volumetric content — Gracia handles processing only, not capture. Workflow: client shoots with a capture partner (Gracia refers clients to the nearest partner if needed), footage comes to Gracia, and delivery is typically 3–5 days as

title: Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive 100G
body: World's first live-production Apple Immersive Video camera. Dual 8K×8K RGBW sensors, 16 stops of dynamic range, 100G Ethernet output. Pairs with the URSA Live Encoder for real-time ProRes output — live sports, concerts, and events in AIV are now possible. Announced NAB 2026.

title: AIME Generator
body: Creates Apple Immersive Video lens profile files (.aime) for virtually any VR180 camera — not just the URSA Cine Immersive. Mac only.

title: AIVU Trimmer
body: macOS tool for trimming .aivu files without re-encoding — preserves all Apple immersive metadata (AIME, VenueDescriptor, spatial audio). Also exports: SBS MP4 for Meta Quest 3 preview (7680×3840, 60fps HEVC), rectilinear 16:9 for flat screen editing using a Blackmagic ST map EXR, and supports .cube

title: Wooden Camera — URSA Cine Immersive Accessories
body: Redesigned Top Plate and Side Rails for the URSA Cine Immersive's dual-lens form factor, Riser Plate with airflow spacing, and D-Box Gold Mount Plus power system. "The market for immersive filmmaking is still emerging, but it's important that our accessories evolve alongside it." — Dominick Aiello,

title: Logitech MUSE Stylus for Vision Pro
body: Precision stylus for Vision Pro. Enables collaborative spatial workflows — developers have demonstrated two users annotating the same 3D object simultaneously using MUSE and Nearby Sharing.

title: PlayStation VR2 Sense Controller & Charging Station
body: Traditional gaming controller support for Vision Pro. Available on the Apple Store.

title: Gates Immersive Housing
body: Developed in close collaboration with Apple and Blackmagic Design specifically for the URSA Cine Immersive. 12-inch AR-coated glass dome port. Precise camera alignment with custom system calibration — the calibration file is unique to each camera/housing/dome combination and applied in DaVinci Resol

title: Apple Spatial Audio Format — AAX Plugin Suite (Pro Tools)
body: Official Apple production suite for Avid Pro Tools built on psychoacoustic principles. Delivers compelling, externalized audio experiences for Apple Immersive Video. Download from the AIV Resources page.

title: Meet Apple Spatial Audio Format and APAC
body: Official Apple session introducing ASAF and the Apple Positional Audio Codec — how spatial audio is captured, encoded, and delivered for Apple Vision Pro.

title: fxguide — Believable and Immersive Audio
body: By Mike Seymour, May 20, 2026. Two threads woven together: an FMX session on concert-crowd spatial audio recording by Emmy and Golden Reel-winning sound editor Jens Rosenlund Petersen (Bohemian Rhapsody, Saltburn) and a practical deep dive on ASAF for Apple Immersive Video. Includes a downloadable A

title: Cinematic Immersive for Professionals
body: By Ben Allan & Clara Chong. The first comprehensive guide to the creative and technical aspects of Apple Immersive Video — from concept through post-production. Available on Apple Books.

title: Blackmagic URSA Cine Immersive Camera Manual
body: Full guide covering camera operation and DaVinci Resolve AIV workflows. PDF. Essential reference for URSA Cine Immersive operators.

title: What is Apple Immersive Video? — Acute Immersive
body: Clear, accessible explainer on the AIV format, the hardware, and what makes it different from other immersive media. Good starting point for anyone new to the format.

title: Watch Apple Immersive Video and 3D Movies — Apple Support
body: Official Apple guide to finding and watching Apple Immersive Video in the Apple TV app on Vision Pro. Covers how to browse, download for offline viewing, and switch between 2D and 3D.

title: Creator Week Educational Series
body: Apple-produced series covering all media types for visionOS apps, games, and experiences — 2D, 3D, spatial video, 180°, 360°, Wide FOV, and Apple Immersive Video. Best overview of the full format landscape.

title: Team2Films Immersive Master Class
body: Team 2 Films walks through what it takes to create an immersive documentary for Apple Vision Pro — production, workflow, and lessons learned.

title: Hugh Hou AIV Master Class
body: Complete URSA Cine Immersive to Apple Vision Pro workflow in DaVinci Resolve. Targeted tutorials from beginner to advanced.

title: AIV Community YouTube Playlist
body: Community-curated collection of Apple Immersive Video production videos.

title: Hugh Hou Patreon
body: Extended tutorials and behind-the-scenes production content from Hugh Hou. Paid subscription.

title: Build Live Production Tools for Apple Immersive Video
body: The essential session for live AIV. Covers packaging immersive video, spatial audio, and scene metadata for IP transport using SMPTE 2110. Uses Immersive Media Support, Video Toolbox, and AVFoundation for real-time workflows. Watch WWDC25 "Learn about Apple Immersive Video technologies" first.

title: Use Foveated Streaming to Bring Immersive Content to visionOS
body: How foveated streaming delivers remotely rendered scenes to Vision Pro at full fidelity, completely wirelessly. Covers the FoveatedStreaming framework, NVIDIA CloudXR SDK integration, and dynamic foveation with privacy preservation.

title: Design Immersive Environments for visionOS Apps and the Spatial Web
body: Creating photoreal visionOS environments for apps, websites, and SharePlay — design principles, CG asset prep, real-time motion and lighting effects.

title: Explore Immersive Website Environments in visionOS
body: New Immersive API in JavaScript — request immersive transitions from inline model elements, build real-world-scale web experiences with video docking, all from a few lines of code.

title: Discover USDKit and What's New in OpenUSD
body: WWDC26 update on USDKit and the latest in OpenUSD for spatial content creation.

title: Iterate Your Spatial Scenes Faster with Reality Composer Pro 3
body: WWDC26 · Reality Composer Pro 3 — faster iteration on spatial scenes.

title: Day 1 — Immersive & Interactive Storytelling for visionOS
body: Oct 21, 2025 · 6+ hours. What's new in immersive and interactive media for visionOS 26; creating stories with immersive video and audio; design fundamentals; D-Day: The Camera Soldier learnings; RealityKit; SharePlay and spatial Personas; Q&A.

title: Day 2 — Apple Immersive Video & Spatial Audio Deep Dive
body: Oct 22, 2025 · 4+ hours. AIV format; ASAF and APAC audio; capturing on location; spatial audio workflow; Blackmagic Design post workflows; Colorfront dailies and mastering; SpatialGen hosting and distribution; The Weeknd "Open Hearts" pre-vis learnings; live events; unscripted productions; post prod

title: Apple Immersive Video — Official Developer Portal
body: Apple's comprehensive reference for the AIV format — 90fps at 50MP+ per eye, 60 pixels per degree acuity, 230° field of view capability, and the full compound file format explained. The authoritative starting point for anyone building with or producing for AIV.

title: What's New in Apple Immersive Video (WWDC26)
body: WWDC26 updates: Apple Immersive Live formats (official live pipeline built on SMPTE 2110 — ProRes, Spatial Audio, and lens metadata before MV-HEVC encoding); ImmersiveMediaSupport framework now on iPadOS and iOS; camera override capabilities for live production; Y-axis flipping for inverted camera r

title: What's New in visionOS 27 (WWDC26 Guide)
body: The definitive WWDC26 reference for visionOS 27 — AIV enhancements, Foveated Streaming framework, Reality Composer Pro 3, Spatial Preview, enhanced object tracking, and more. Coming this fall.

title: Spatial and Immersive Media — Technology Overview
body: Apple's comprehensive overview of immersive media capabilities in visionOS — covering all video formats, AIV architecture, and the IMS framework for custom workflows.

title: Processing AIV with Foveation — Sample Code
body: Apple's official sample project demonstrating static foveation: reduces 8K/eye at 90fps (10 billion pixels/sec) to a streamable 4K while maintaining perceptual resolution.

title: Learn About Apple Immersive Video Technologies (WWDC25)
body: AIV format deep dive: ImmersiveMediaSupport framework, encoding pipeline, and HLS streaming delivery.

title: Explore Video Experiences for visionOS (WWDC25)
body: Full overview of all visionOS video formats — 180°, 360°, Wide FOV, AIV, 2D, 3D, and spatial video.

title: ImmersiveMediaSupport Framework
body: Apple developer documentation for immersive media technologies and frameworks.

title: Converting 3D Video to Multiview HEVC & Spatial Video
body: How to convert existing 3D HEVC files to multiview HEVC and spatial video format for visionOS.

title: Spatial & Immersive Media — ISOBMFF Extensions (PDF)
body: Apple's technical specification for ISOBMFF extensions supporting spatial and immersive media formats.

body: Apple's open-source reference implementation for CloudXR/OpenXR streaming on visionOS.

title: fxguide — Delivering AIV for Streaming: A Practical Workflow
body: By Mike Seymour, March 26, 2026. MV-HEVC delivery pipeline using The Dobos Connection as case study. Key result: 83 GB upload instead of 1.3 TB — roughly 1/16th the size. Uses DaVinci Resolve, no proprietary tools.

title: fxguide — Immersive Drama: More Than VR, More Than Film
body: By Clara Chong, March 11, 2026. Deep dive into the making of The Dobos Connection — the creative and technical choices that make AIV drama work differently from film or VR.

title: Flashback to the Future — Frank-David Cohen of Immersive Flashback
body: Sandwich Vision interview with Immersive Flashback co-founder Frank-David Cohen. Covers filming Bastille Day with President Macron, building a studio from a passion project, and the honest economics of immersive content. May 2026.

title: Spatial Insider — Inside AIV with Ben Allan & Clara Chong
body: 34-minute interview with the filmmakers behind The Fine Dining Bakery and Cinematic Immersive for Professionals. Covers the full URSA Cine Immersive workflow, post-production in DaVinci Resolve, and the storytelling challenges unique to 180° space.

title: CineD — Filmmaking for the Vision Pro Era

body: Emmy-winning studio (SNL 50th Anniversary VR). Feb 2026. 200+ projects over 10 years. Practical perspective on 2026 production realities: budget discipline, reliability, multiformat delivery. Co-founders Matthew Celia and Robert Watts, Los Angeles.

title: Immersa — Professional Delivery Platform
body: Upload 180°/360° immersive video and distribute via branded links or white label Vision Pro apps — without building a custom app from scratch. Designed for filmmakers and studios.

ProRes 2110 in → MV-HEVC stream out, handles all dynamic metadata. Configurable to your own CDN. Lifetime license, customer-owned hardware, 1 y

body: Showing "coming soon" as of May 2026 — check each build session for availability.

title: SpatialGen
body: Immersive video hosting and distribution platform. Also covers AIV news and releases.

title:
Wheelchair Eye Control — Apple Vision Pro
        Vision Pro users can now control motorized wheelchairs using only their eyes. Launches with Tolt and LUCI alternative drive systems in the US. Developed in partnership with Team Gleason. "The option to control my power wheelchair on my own is gold to me." — Pat Dolan, founder of GeoALS and Team Gleason patient advisory board member living with ALS for 10 years. Apple Newsroom, May 2026.

title:
University of Michigan — VR Therapy for MS Patients
        A University of Michigan professor earned national recognition for using VR to bring nature experiences to patients whose mobility is limited by multiple sclerosis — treating depression through immersive presence when physical presence isn't possible.

title:
Southwest Airlines — MockThru Spatial Environment Modeling
        Southwest Airlines' Technology Innovation team built MockThru, a custom Apple Vision Pro app that replaces physical foam core mockups with immersive spatial walkthroughs of customer and employee environments. At AWE USA 2026, Sr. Innovator Jeffrey Berthiaume and Lead Technology Innovator Justin Leger demoed the app live — walking through the audience at life size with AR models, ending with a virtual jet bridge leading into the convention center lobby where a full life-size plane was placed in AR. The session covered the decision to build a custom app, why Vision Pro was the right hardware choice, and what's next. Learn more at realityapps.biz.

title: Physical Spatial Input Arrives for Vision Pro
body: Apple's Accessory Design Guidelines R30 adds a new section: Spatial Accessories — a developer preview category in visionOS 27. Spatial accessories provide inertial data, direct user actions, and a power-efficient synchronized infrared location reference. The device computes position and orientation
